notableEvents.label: Marcelo Mayer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer pops out to third baseman Hao-Yu Lee in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio grounds into a double play, shortstop Javier Báez to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Roman Anthony out at 2nd. Andruw Monasterio out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida grounds out, second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Javier Báez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter walks. Javier Báez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to first baseman Andruw Monasterio. Kerry Carpenter out at 3rd. Gleyber Torres to 2nd. Matt Vierling out at 1st.
